name: Alchemist
description: Forward Jellyfin media events to Alchemist and refresh Jellyfin after completed jobs.
overview: Integrates Jellyfin with Alchemist using a narrowed API token, path translations, and completed-job refresh events.

versions.changelog: Initial Jellyfin 10.11 plugin with enqueue hooks, Alchemist event listening, reverse path translation, and containing-directory refresh.
